taskTitle: Study the six pillars of Iman
csQueryPrompt: For a MILOS subtask titled 'Study belief in the Books (al-Kutub)' under the parent task 'Study the six pillars of Iman' (module: faith_shahada_core), propose exactly 2 NotebookLM queries to a Quran/Hadith primary-source corpus: (1) Quran-biased — name likely primary ayat that directly or contextually anchor this subtask; (2) Hadith-biased — name likely Sahih hadith (Bukhari/Muslim preferred) that directly or contextually anchor this subtask. Return the queries inside a <queries></queries> block as a numbered list, each one sentence, ready to paste into a retrieval system. Do NOT answer the queries — query formulation only.
extractedQueries: What are the primary ayat, such as Surah Al-Baqarah 2:285 and Surah An-Nisa 4:136, that directly mandate the belief in all divinely revealed Books (al-Kutub) as a foundational requirement of Islamic faith?

Which authentic narrations, particularly the definitive Hadith of Jibril found in Sahih Muslim 8 and Sahih al-Bukhari 50, explicitly enumerate the belief in His Books as the third core article of Iman?
